---
title: "useful tools"
---

![](cat_tools.gif)

# Misc

-   use quarto to make a website on github [youtube tutorial series](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EjGdjHCo_Ms&list=PLkrJrLs7xfbXcEKhTCKRSr2VXH4yiBeXo&index=6), automatically render website on push [link](https://quarto.org/docs/publishing/github-pages.html#github-action)
